mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sector_context_snapshot_v3 ( trade_date, sector_name, sector_strength_1430, sector_breadth_1430, sector_volume_ratio, sector_rank, stock_count, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.sectorName}, #{item.sectorStrength1430}, #{item.sectorBreadth1430}, #{item.sectorVolumeRatio}, #{item.sectorRank}, #{item.stockCount}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sector_strength_1430 = VALUES(sector_strength_1430), sector_breadth_1430 = VALUES(sector_breadth_1430), sector_volume_ratio = VALUES(sector_volume_ratio), sector_rank = VALUES(sector_rank), stock_count = VALUES(stock_count)
